name: the dried meat
identity: A basic sustenance item used to feed the young trackers during their training, providing them with necessary nourishment while they learn the ways of the Quiet Weave.
current_status: Being presented by the player character to Chief Thorne as part of a diplomatic gift bundle, alongside preserved tubers and fermented stores, intended to ensure the tribe survives the winter without starvation.

volatile_state.location: held by two of the player character's people, placed before Chief Thorne
volatile_state.current_activity: being offered as a diplomatic gift to secure the tribe's survival through winter
